```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?character ?characterLabel ?class ?classLabel ?race ?raceLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q3793236 wdt:P933 ?character .
  ?character wdt:P106 ?class .
  ?character wdt:P1224 ?race .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?character rdfs:label ?characterLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?characterLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?class rdfs:label ?classLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?classLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?race rdfs:label ?raceLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?raceLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
```
